title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 249.710 - Penalty for nonpayment of tax fixed — prior inconsistent laws repealed
text:
249.710.  Penalty for nonpayment of tax fixed — prior inconsistent laws repealed. — Hereafter all penalties for the nonpayment of any tax levied by any sewer district incorporated under the laws of this state shall be one-half of one percent per month and no more, notwithstanding the provision of any prior law under which such sewer district may have been or may be hereafter incorporated, and any and all provisions of any law under which sewer districts may have been or may hereafter be incorporated inconsistent with the provisions of this section are hereby repealed.
(RSMo 1939 § 12686)
